content:
MODULE: cosmos.cli.interactive
FILE: cosmos/cli/interactive.py (353 lines)
CATEGORY: cli

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Interactive Shell

An enhanced interactive shell with history, autocomplete, and rich output.

CLASSES:
- Command: A shell command definition.
- InteractiveShell: Enhanced interactive shell for cosmos.

Features:
- Command history with persist
  Methods: def register_command(self, command: Command)
  Methods: async def run(self, prompt: str='cosmos> ')
